about.heading: About the Lawyer
about.name: Davronbek Qo'chqorov
about.title: Master of Laws, Senior Attorney
about.bio1: I have been practising law since 2014. I graduated from Tashkent State University of Law and completed several international professional development programmes.
about.bio2: My core areas are family law, labour law, corporate and business law, real estate, tax law, contracts, and court representation. I have successfully handled over 400 cases across these fields.

credentials.edu: Tashkent State University of Law — Master of Laws, 2014

step1.title: Contact Us
step1.description: Reach out via Telegram or phone

step3.title: Agreement
step3.description: Sign an agreement with clear terms and pricing

q1.question: Is the first consultation free?
q1.answer: Yes, the first 30-minute consultation is completely free.

q2.question: How is the cost determined?
q2.answer: Cost depends on case complexity. Contact us for detailed information.

q3.question: How long until I get a response?
q3.answer: We respond via Telegram or phone within 1 hour.

q4.question: Do you work nationwide?
q4.answer: Yes, we provide online services throughout Uzbekistan.

q5.question: What documents do I need to prepare?
q5.answer: No documents are required for the initial consultation.
